reviews.comment:
Esta remodelada, bastante bien, buena atención... a veces ponen pocos playeros y se demora, pero en general muy bien.

(Translated by Google)
It's been remodeled, pretty good, good service... sometimes they put out a few beach chairs and it takes a while, but overall it's very good.

reviews.comment:
En primero muy caro el servicio mínimo q tenga atención en mesa, segundo como puede ser que tengan por Internet la tele, no se pueden ver los partidos dos tele una con 30 segundo de diferencia malisimo. Mínimo semejante local tengan directv, flow cable no se.

(Translated by Google)
First, the service is very expensive, even with minimal table service. Second, how can they have internet TV? You can't watch the games on two TVs, one 30 seconds apart, terrible. At least a similar venue should have DirecTV, Flow, or cable. I don't know.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8171823765692458471/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBdWMtOVFnEAE
